name: @hauska-engine/atoms
description: Engine-side atom-instance registry. Consumes @hauska-engine/atom-contract-pin pre-Sync-1, swaps to @hauska/atom-contract on Sync 1. Binds Bump 1 atom-type definitions (code-section, code-definition, code-amendment, code-cross-reference, code-edition, jurisdiction-corpus) to runtime atom instances per jurisdiction ingest.
